name: Chocolate Pizza (1)
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Refrigerated chocolate chip cookie dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 360°F.
2. Grease pizza pan.
3. Press cookie dough evenly around the pan.
4. Bake for 12-13 minutes.
5. Remove the pan from the oven and distribute about two-thirds of the chocolate chips on the dough.
6. Return the pan to the oven for a minute.
7. Remove the pan from the oven and spread the melted chocolate evenly over the dough.
8. Let cool slightly.
9. Warm the frosting for easy spreading.
10. Spread evenly on top of the melted chocolate, leaving a border around the edge.
11. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips and walnut pieces on top.
12. Let cool before cutting into small pieces.
